title: RepairStrategiesCatalog
description: v4 P5 (D5 / F20) — operator-visible inventory of every repair strategy registered by `RepairRegistry::with_builtin()`. Sidecar to `config/repair-strategies.yaml`. The catalog is documentation: the in-code strategies remain the source of truth for `RepairProposal`s. Changes to the catalog must be paired with matching Rust strategy files under `crates/core/src/repair/strategies/`.

version.description: SemVer. Bumped when the catalog gains/loses an entry.

id.description: Stable snake_case identifier — MUST match `RepairStrategy::id()` for the corresponding Rust strategy. Referenced from `UnblockPath::AttemptRepair { strategy_id, .. }`.

required_credentials.description: Credential classes the SME must present at accept time. References `config/credential-classes.yaml` (Phase 4 / D6 / F21).

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation surfaced in the SME-facing repair card.
